parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflowName: $json.workflow.name || 'Unknown Workflow', workflowId: $json.workflow.id || 'N/A', executionId: $json.execution.id || 'N/A', nodeName: $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted || 'Unknown Node', errorMessage: $json.execution.error.message || 'No error message available', timestamp: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-TW', { timeZone: 'Asia/Taipei' }), executionUrl: $json.execution.url || '' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ embeds: [{ title: '\u26a0\ufe0f n8n \u5de5\u4f5c\u6d41\u7570\u5e38', color: 16711680, fields: [{ name: '\u5de5\u4f5c\u6d41', value: $json.workflowName + ' (ID: ' + $json.workflowId + ')', inline: false }, { name: '\u5931\u6557\u7bc0\u9ede', value: $json.nodeName, inline: true }, { name: '\u57f7\u884c ID', value: $json.executionId, inline: true }, { name: '\u932f\u8aa4\u8a0a\u606f', value: '```\n' + $json.errorMessage.substring(0, 1000) + '\n```', inline: false }, { name: '\u6642\u9593', value: $json.timestamp, inline: true }], footer: { text: 'JARVIS Error Handler' } }] }) }}
